page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg7.32xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated physical cores and 128 vCPUs on the x86_64 architecture, utilizing Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at 2.9 GHz. The instance is configured with 512.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include local storage, requiring external block storage solutions for data persistence. It features a high network bandwidth baseline of 64 Gbps to support intensive network communication. With a 1:1 ratio of physical cores to vCPUs, the instance avoids resource contention from hyperthreading, offering predictable compute performance for demanding workloads.

The hardware profile is suitable for large-scale general-purpose workloads, enterprise applications, and multi-threaded processing tasks that benefit from dedicated CPU resources and high network throughput. The lack of bundled local storage and GPUs positions this instance as a dedicated compute and memory resource, where cost efficiency is realized through high physical core density and balanced resource allocation.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg7.32xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 128 dedicated physical cores and 128 vCPUs on the x86_64 architecture. Powered by Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at 2.9 GHz, it provides 512.0 GB of system memory, resulting in a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance operates on the KVM hypervisor and does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage. It delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. With a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, it ensures dedicated, predictable CPU performance without hyperthreading overhead. This configuration is suitable for enterprise applications, large-scale web serving, and multi-threaded workloads requiring high network throughput and dedicated compute resources.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmg7.32xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 128 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 64 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for predictable enterprise workloads.

tagline: A high-density, dedicated physical core instance featuring balanced memory allocation and high-speed network bandwidth for demanding enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369B physical cores with no hyperthreading
512.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core
64 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer
KVM hypervisor architecture with dedicated CPU allocation
Designed for enterprise applications, large-scale web serving, and multi-threaded workloads
